label: Nail Artist

beats.name: HOOK
beats.video_prompt: Extreme macro close-up, 0.5mm nail art brush, white gel polish on perfectly prepared nail. Italian nail artist holding her breath, painting a tiny flower. Phone vibrates on table. She doesn't move. Vibrates again. Third ring: her hand trembles one millimeter. The flower is ruined. She must redo it. Intimate workstation, LED lamp glow, warm focused light, extreme shallow DOF, documentary tension, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

beats.name: PROBLEM
beats.video_prompt: Same nail workstation, now empty. Half-finished nails on the display hand on table. Client cancelled last second. Phone timer showing 1h 15min already started. Stark intimate light, lonely atmosphere, documentary close-up, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

voiceover.text: Settantacinque minuti per una ricostruzione con nail art. Un no-show: settantacinque minuti vuoti. Sessanta euro non incassati. E non puoi rispondere al telefono quando hai il pennellino in mano.

beats.name: AGITATION
beats.video_prompt: Empty nail workstation with tools laid out but no client. UV lamp still on, gel bottles open. Waiting. Cold focused light, still camera, uncomfortable emptiness, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

beats.name: SOLUTION
beats.video_prompt: Same nail artist, brush in hand, steady hand, perfect flower on nail. Phone face-down on table shows silent notification: 'Sara: Martina confermata per domani 14:30'. She hasn't read it. She doesn't need to. She's focused. The flower is perfect. Warm intimate light, saturated warm tones, macro beauty shot, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

voiceover.text: Con FLUXION, Sara risponde e prenota mentre tu lavori. Il promemoria parte da solo, il no-show scende. La tua postazione e sempre occupata. Le tue mani restano ferme. Zero abbonamenti. Zero commissioni.
FLUXION. Quattrocentonovantasette euro. Una volta. Per sempre.

lines.text: Il gestionale che non ti costa ogni mese

video_gen_config.negative_prompt: text overlay, watermarks, logos, brand names, blurry, distorted faces, low quality, overexposed, artifacts, generic stock footage, CGI, artificial
video_gen_config.style_prefix: Cinematic 4K, intimate macro beauty, authentic nail art studio, warm artistic documentary

music_gen_config.genre_hint: delicate artistic, soft electronic with chimes, feminine elegance

prompts.tense: delicate tension, soft electronic pulse, crystal chimes, uneasy beauty, minor key, 70bpm, no vocals
prompts.uplifting: delicate triumph, warm electronic shimmer, soft piano melody, artistic confidence, major key, 100bpm, no vocals

wa_message:
Ciao [nome], con il pennellino in mano non puoi rispondere.
Questo lo fa Sara. [VIDEO]
